title: Uttarakhand Teacher Eligibility Test UTET 2026 + Government Job + India + Apply Now
excerpt: Uttarakhand Teacher Eligibility Test UTET 2026 online application process has started. Candidates can apply online from 14 July 2026 to 03 August 2026. The exam will be held on 29 September 2026.
value_prop: _Apply now for the Uttarakhand Teacher Eligibility Test UTET 2026 and start your teaching career in India_
secondary_subtitle: _Get all the details about the UTET 2026 exam, including eligibility criteria, application process, and important dates_

About Organization

Uttarakhand Board of School Education (UBSE) is the organization responsible for conducting the Uttarakhand Teacher Eligibility Test UTET 2026.

As per official notification, the organization is responsible for the education system in the state of Uttarakhand.

About the Programme

The Uttarakhand Teacher Eligibility Test UTET 2026 is a government job opportunity for candidates who want to start their teaching career in India.

The programme is designed to test the eligibility of candidates for teaching positions in schools in the state of Uttarakhand.
